ttl.name: REAR SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the rear separate type seat back cover with 9 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the rear separate type seat back cover to the seat back pad with 9 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the rear separate type seat back cover to the seat back pad with 7 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY RH
INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY LH
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the 2 front seat headrest supports.
Using hog ring pliers, install the rear separate type seat back cover to the seat back frame with 6 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the 2 front seat headrest supports.
Using hog ring pliers, install the rear separate type seat back cover to the seat back frame with 7 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK LOCK BEZEL UPPER
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for RH Side)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for RH Side)
INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK LOCK BEZEL UPPER (for RH Side)
INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE RH
INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE LH
INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT ARMREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEAT BACK HINGE COVER
INSTALL REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install 16 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the rear bench type seat cushion cover to the seat cushion pad with 36 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.
